title: IDF Witness Record
description: A witness record documenting a structural decision made during crystallization. See Part 2 §5.

basis.description: Kind of structural decision. Normative values are listed; implementations MAY use namespaced custom values (e.g., 'vendor:feature-x').

reliability.description: Degree of assertion the witness makes. Normative values are listed; unrecognized values MUST be treated as 'heuristic'.

pattern.description: Identifier of the rule or pattern that produced this witness. Semantics is basis-specific.

slot.description: Canonical slot name the decision applies to, if any.

projection.description: Identifier of the projection whose artifact contains this witness, if applicable.

requirements.description: Per-requirement breakdown for rule-based or constructive witnesses.

salience.description: Salience value shared by the tied group. Required for basis='alphabetical-fallback'.

chosen.description: Intent identifier selected from the tied group. Required for basis='alphabetical-fallback'.

peers.description: Other tied intent identifiers (lexicographic order), not chosen. Required for basis='alphabetical-fallback'.

recommendation.description: Human-readable hint for the author. Typically present for basis='alphabetical-fallback'.
